Variables.Name: PrimitiveRenderMode
Variables.Description: Controls what primitives get rendered into the scene capture.

Variables.Name: HiddenComponents
Variables.Description: The components won't rendered by current component.

Variables.Name: HiddenActors
Variables.Description: The actors to hide in the scene capture.

Variables.Name: ShowOnlyComponents
Variables.Description: The only components to be rendered by this scene capture, if PrimitiveRenderMode is set to UseShowOnlyList.

Variables.Name: ShowOnlyActors
Variables.Description: The only actors to be rendered by this scene capture, if PrimitiveRenderMode is set to UseShowOnlyList.

Variables.Name: bCaptureEveryFrame
Variables.Description: Whether to update the capture's contents every frame.  If disabled, the component will render once on load and then only when moved.

Variables.Name: bCaptureOnMovement
Variables.Description: Whether to update the capture's contents on movement.  Disable if you are going to capture manually from blueprint.

Variables.Name: bAlwaysPersistRenderingState
Variables.Description: Whether to persist the rendering state even if bCaptureEveryFrame==false.  This allows velocities for Motion Blur and Temporal AA to be computed.

Variables.Name: LODDistanceFactor
Variables.Description: Scales the distance used by LOD. Set to values greater than 1 to cause the scene capture to use lower LODs than the main view to speed up the scene capture pass.

Variables.Name: MaxViewDistanceOverride
Variables.Description: if > 0, sets a maximum render distance override.  Can be used to cull distant objects from a reflection if the reflecting plane is in an enclosed area like a hallway or room

Variables.Name: CaptureSortPriority
Variables.Description: Capture priority within the frame to sort scene capture on GPU to resolve interdependencies between multiple capture components. Highest come first.

Variables.Name: ShowFlagSettings
Variables.Description: ShowFlags for the SceneCapture's ViewFamily, to control rendering settings for this view. Hidden but accessible through details customization

Functions.Name: HideComponent
Functions.Description: Adds the component to our list of hidden components.

Functions.Name: HideActorComponents
Functions.Description: Adds all primitive components in the actor to our list of hidden components.

Functions.Name: ShowOnlyComponent
Functions.Description: Adds the component to our list of show-only components.

Functions.Name: ShowOnlyActorComponents
Functions.Description: Adds all primitive components in the actor to our list of show-only components.

Functions.Name: RemoveShowOnlyComponent
Functions.Description: Removes a component from the Show Only list.

Functions.Name: RemoveShowOnlyActorComponents
Functions.Description: Removes a actor's components from the Show Only list.
